issues.check: Every feature maps to specific tasks in tasks.md
issues.description: F0 in features.md listed tasks as T010-T017 but T041 (Storage Management, also under F0 in tasks.md) was missing from the feature's task list
issues.fix_description: Updated F0 in features.md to include T041 and added PRD reference for Sprint 1, Task 6

issues.check: Feature IDs in features.md match references in user_stories.md and tasks.md
issues.description: features.md overview stated '27 features organized in 4 phases' but there are 6 implementation phase documents, not 4
issues.fix_description: Updated features.md overview to clarify '4 logical groups mapped to 6 implementation phases' with the full phase list

issues.check: Task IDs in tasks.md match IDs in phase docs
issues.description: Systemic issue: Blocks fields in phase docs did not accurately reflect direct dependents from tasks.md. 17 Blocks fields across 6 phase documents were incorrect — some listed transitive dependents instead of direct ones, some omitted direct dependents entirely. Affected tasks: Phase 1 (T011, T012), Phase 2 (T032, T033), Phase 3 (T071), Phase 4 (T098), Phase 5 (T122, T123, T124, T125, T130, T133, T134), Phase 6 (T162, T169, T174, T177)
issues.fix_description: Corrected all 17 Blocks fields to match the inverse of Depends-on relationships defined in tasks.md. Examples: T130 Blocks changed from 'T131, T134' to 'T131, T133'; T134 Blocks changed from 'T135, T136, T139' to 'T135, T138, T139'; T162 Blocks changed from 'Nothing' to 'T165'

issues.check: No monolithic phases (>20 tasks in a single phase)
issues.description: Phase 5 (YELLOW Attribution & Git Branching) has 21 tasks and Phase 6 (Visualization, Analytics & Polish) has 22 tasks, both exceeding the 20-task guideline
issues.fix_description: Accepted trade-off: both phases are internally organized into clear sub-sections (Phase 5 has 6 sub-sections, Phase 6 has 8 sub-sections). Splitting would create 8-10 phase documents, increasing cross-document navigation overhead without meaningful benefit. Tasks within each phase are logically cohesive and share evaluation criteria.

completeness_checks.user_stories_acceptance_criteria_count: pass — all 30 user stories have 4-7 acceptance criteria
completeness_checks.features_to_tasks: pass (after fix: F0 now includes T041)
completeness_checks.tasks_to_phase_docs: pass — all 88 tasks have corresponding phase doc entries
completeness_checks.phase_docs_evaluation_criteria: pass — all 6 phase docs have Phase Evaluation Criteria
completeness_checks.tasks_evaluation_checklists: pass — all 88 tasks have Evaluation Checklists
completeness_checks.non_goals_not_covered: pass — none of the 8 PRD non-goals are implemented

consistency_checks.task_numbering_sequential: pass — sequential within each phase (gaps between phases by design)
consistency_checks.feature_ids_match: pass — F0-F26 consistent across features.md, user_stories.md, tasks.md
consistency_checks.task_ids_match: pass (after fixing 17 Blocks fields across all phase docs)
consistency_checks.phase_count_matches: pass — README lists 6 phases, 6 phase docs exist
consistency_checks.total_task_count_matches: pass — tasks.md says 88, actual count is 88

traceability_checks.forward_prd_to_implementation: pass — all PRD sprint tasks trace to features, stories, tasks, and phase docs
traceability_checks.backward_implementation_to_prd: pass — all 88 tasks trace back to PRD sections via user stories and features
traceability_checks.no_unimplemented_features: pass — all 27 features have associated tasks

quality_checks.executable_evaluation_criteria: pass — Phase 1 has CLI commands; Phases 2-6 have specific testable scenarios
quality_checks.sufficient_implementation_notes: pass — all tasks include code examples or patterns
quality_checks.estimated_scope_provided: pass — all tasks have scope estimates (15min to 2hr)

cross_validation.pass_1_forward: All PRD requirements (4 sprints, 29 tasks) map to implementation features, stories, and tasks. No unmapped PRD requirements.
cross_validation.pass_2_backward: All 88 implementation tasks trace back to PRD sections. No scope creep detected.
cross_validation.pass_3_internal: All cross-references verified and corrected. Feature IDs, user story IDs, task IDs, and dependency chains are internally consistent after fixes.

summary: 37 verification checks evaluated. 20 issues found (1 completeness, 18 consistency, 1 anti-pattern) and 19 fixed in 1 iteration. 1 remaining issue (monolithic phases) accepted as a design trade-off. All documents are internally consistent and fully traceable from PRD to implementation.
